title: EntityRecognizerFilter
description: Provides information for filtering a list of entity recognizers. You can only specify one filtering parameter in a request. For more information, see the ListEntityRecognizers operation./>

allOf.description: The status of an entity recognizer.
The name that you assigned the entity recognizer.

Filters the list of entities based on the time that the list was submitted for processing. Returns only jobs submitted before the specified time. Jobs are returned in descending order, newest to oldest.

Filters the list of entities based on the time that the list was submitted for processing. Returns only jobs submitted after the specified time. Jobs are returned in ascending order, oldest to newest.
